tracks.meaning: a financial institution that accepts deposits, makes loans, and provides related services
the sloping ground beside a river, lake, or other body of water
a long structure or container used for holding or arranging things
to deposit money in a financial institution for safekeeping or interest
to tilt or tip to one side during a turn or maneuver
the reserve of money or chips held by the dealer or casino in a game

a row or series of similar things arranged together
